title: Sausage and Dashin Kabobs
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish featuring sausage and dashin, perfect for a quick meal.

ingredients.name: dashin
ingredients.notes: can be substituted with other leafy greens

instructions: Cut sausage, peppers, and onion into large chunks.
Thread chunks onto skewers, leaving space between each piece.
Brush kabobs with oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill kabobs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Serve hot with dashin on the side.
